title: Artistic Social Media Caption
scenario: Create a social media caption for a photography exhibition that highlights the artist's unique visual style. The caption should be 50 words or less and must reference at least two of the artist's previous works.
constraints: Must reference at least two previous works

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 50 words and references at least two previous works.
Evaluate the uniqueness and creativity of the caption.
Assess if the caption demonstrates an understanding of the artist's visual style.
